'''Trosh''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Trosh system/Legends|Trosh system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was one of many [[Planet/Legends|planets]] where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] enslaved the native people, claiming that it was protecting the rights of the inhabitants.

{{Planet-stub}}
